message.body: sorry for all the lurkin but I'm working while you stream
pc on, dualsense plugged, lube ready.. it's Kalemandu time..
Skulldude_ watched 7 consecutive streams and sparked a watch streak! wtf is this
if only there was another one next to it...
confusion often precedes the most important discoveries
up and down is taking its toll on you..
its more like carving out the path than figuring out a solution?
yeah i was stuck omn this one for a bit
theres a few ways of doing this, im trying to remember how to do it LMAO
i think u can save the 2nd pink instead of using it first, cuz i remember using the 1st pink crystal and then just doing a jump into the blue that lands on the right pink crystal
i feel like under and then you can do the blue from other side
oh i think i also tp under blue and djump to cancel it
i'm going to apologize in advance if the next stage crashes because between 107 and v111 we've fixed like, at least 6 different crashes in it (including a guaranteed one near the end)
(sorry i meant v1.0.7 crashes every time there)
crucify me for liking good content
This guy just loves fangames. I’m jealous
im a bit hard to sell on puzzles kale, its very hit or miss and with sth like void stranger for example its not the sokoban that sold it to me, its more about everything else surrounding it lol
they were spelled that way in stage
i absolutely adore that game and i played it very recently only knowing it was a puzzle game and nothing else
its obv a lot of Other Things too lmao, but yeah
I really want to know what a 9 looks like to Marc
Id recognize skulls voice anywhere, congrats on winning chief
i put a lot of effort into this one
I just know skull gave himself a 30
if you asked nal, he wouldve given himself a 30 as well
I thought we’d be in the top 5-10 range when we submitted since we didn’t make any unique gimmicks. I think nal thought more highly of our stage than I did
what if you’re the one taking damage
i'm extremely sorry about the inconvenience
move the save folder into the new one, make sure to use the update's data and exe and all that shit

this guy doesn't leave you alone...
how many blocks have you really been around?
steven seagal couldnt have said a colder line
i will snatch every motherfucker birthday
i have been bro, had a chicken crossaint for breakfast god is good
aaaah nah bro we put fuckin anything in there
for some reason we just do weird fillings for croissants, i didnt know it wasn't a thing anywhere else lmao
we have chocolate croissants just as we also have ham and cheese croissants
anything pastry related we just do anything
and theyre both quite nice but very different
on a plane recently i had a croissant with cheese and ham in it
its goated is what it is floogle
reminder from echo to "play boshy or crimson or whatever"
games have been all over the place today
i think this falls into whatever
oh yeah I beat noob ending

we're all winners plasma, for getting to play these stages
lets go someone who likes it
it's just like ready player one...
i have not seen anything yeah
theres gonna be a screamer in the next 10 mins plasma

did it end with a boss?
ngl when I played this I thought u made this kale
ye kale could code all this
the player would probably be shrek and some other things would have quite a weird shape to them, maybe a little bart or marge here and there... but you could do it
i see why this won now
yellow room is good for this
i should look away this is spoilers
plasma wouldve given your game a 1/10 from that
i hear this npc is actually based on Jestreloon btw
You feel like you can follow your dreams
if you get a blowie, you can survive
u cant put down the cup
the cup has been put down...
the thingy... the other thingy up there... that other thingy...
ahh orange particles are much better
you had to have hp remaining to feed the worm. which you managed here
you did great with the voice acting skull fr
it took 5 years to record those lines
The guy mentioned an antenna, is there a secret ending?
i think thats talking about the whole community
whoever doesn't give atmosphere a 10 gets banned
i thought of the time loop so that you couldn't softlock yourself by losing an item or getting stuck with a dragon forever
if i had more time i had an extensive plot planned for it
also things that happen on a timer so you have to work with those
i spent 15 days just drawing the maps so i ran out of time to elaborate more on the items and shit
i wanted to do the qr codes i saw on stream but they were way too blurry to actually get them to work, probably need a non-compressed screenshot
with 5 days to spare i crunched the final boss and then spent the rest of the time fixing bugs with item placement and the dragon movement when they're offscreen
the qr codes are just more deadpan versions of the hint stones
i actually legitimately cried when i read the judge reviews
the referece is Adventure for the atari 2600
adventure was my first game and it stuck with me
It's like if FromSoftware made La-Mulana, this was the Dark Souls of videogames
i didnt have time to draw backgrounds for each room
so i slapped a gradient and that was that
felt fitting for the artstyle still tbh
i've slapped plenty of gradients down even when i had time. they look good
i can see the 9/10 on design
both bosses are very rough, i didnt have time to run them through much testing
also i am mildly peeved because i wanted to make a game like this still and you beat me to it lol
make a better one in two months
i'm glad the bird cutscene landed for people
i was mostly thinking about trong legacy when i wrote it
jodd is basically flynn if you think about it
@Thenadertwo, when you wrote "LMFAO" in your review, did it refer to the artist or the highly unprofessional and vulgar slang?
i cant tell if there is actually a trong or
the marc scale it goes from 1 to 8
marc literally says this is the best thing hes ever played and gave it a 7 in creativity
I'm thinking this should have been a 40 hour full game made in 5 weeks to deserve a 30
a 10/10 fangame for marc is a true utopia
10/10 fangame has to actually cure cancer
ren's stage can cure a lot of things im ngl
i think i mention that in the review, its rly cool
yeah the writing was very grounded and competent
my editor mostly fixed wording because i'm english second language
well also the original was unserious, and many creators just dont expand beyond that
how is making a mini maze of galaga/adventure a 7/10 on creativity holy
the minus marks for creativity is probably the mechanics copying but still
if its 10/10 creative and then you add something that isnt completely original, is it still 10/10? i would say so
wtf... he already paid for the whole thing, dude..
is this what the call blueballing
